item.title: Ivermectin is making a post-pandemic comeback, among cancer patients
item.description: The anti-parasitic drug became a household name during the COVID-19 pandemic, and it is now being embraced as an alternative treatment for cancer. It ...

item.title: Got elbow or heel pain? Shockwave therapy can help

item.title: A U.S. scholarship thrills a teacher in India. Then came the soul-crushing questions
item.description: She was thrilled to become the first teacher from a government-sponsored school in India to get a Fulbright exchange award to learn from U.S. schools....
